name: Patient
history: Relationships sometimes shift into romantic connections. Past conflict in relationships following expressions of anger. Complex relationship with parents involving obligations.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must meet others' expectations to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't meet expectations, I will be rejected.
coping_strategies: Avoids silence by filling it with conversation; seeks validation through praise.
situation: An incident at a social gathering resulted in an emotional outburst among friends.
auto_thought: I should have something interesting to say.
behavior: Fills silence with conversation, seeks reassurance from others.
